response: "mix of ancient dust and shimmering light filled the air as the revered force descended upon the village square. The entity, a swirling vortex of forgotten stars, was both a blessing and a curse to the people who watched in hushed awe. She stood at the center, trembling as the transformation began to reshape her very essence. A soft, pearlescent glow wrapped around her limbs, altering the familiar curve of her silhouette into something alien and magnificent. Though the change granted her wings of crystalline light and a voice that could calm storms, the sudden shift left her feeling strangely exposed before her kin. The sensation was not entirely pleasant; it was a nasty, prickling heat that made her skin crawl as reality rewrote itself. She tried to hide her face, embarrassed by the way her new form seemed to demand attention from every corner of the crowd. A single question lingered in the minds of the onlookers: was this liberation or a terrifying new burden? As the magic settled, she realized that power often comes with the price of vulnerability, forcing her to navigate a world that no longer recognized the person she once was."
